title: Acclaimed pianist to play Beethoven pieces
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Arts...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Arts Society is hosting a concert by Laura Pauna, the acclaimed South African / Romanian pianist, on Thursday, 11 April, in the Bartolomeu Dias Museum.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Arts Society is hosting a concert by Laura Pauna, the acclaimed South African / Romanian pianist, on Thursday, 11 April, in the Bartolomeu Dias Museum."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This will be the society’s third concert for 2024.","html":"This will be the society’s third concert for 2024."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sonatas","html":"Sonatas"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The concert, Virtuosic Beethoven Sonatas, includes Appassionata and Les Adieux by Ludwig van Beethoven, as well as other well-known works.","html":"The concert, Virtuosic Beethoven Sonatas, includes Appassionata and Les Adieux by Ludwig van Beethoven, as well as other well-known works."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Laura has a long-standing reputation as an accomplished pianist, having won several local and international prizes and bursaries. Most notable are first prizes in the Oslo-Grieg Piano four-hand and two-hand Piano competition.","html":"Laura has a long-standing reputation as an accomplished pianist, having won several local and international prizes and bursaries. Most notable are first prizes in the Oslo-Grieg Piano four-hand and two-hand Piano competition."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Accolades","html":"Accolades"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her list of accolades includes the Mozartteum prize and first prize at the Ibla Piano Competition. Laura has toured extensively, with many performances at venues such as the Carnegie Hall, the Salzburg Grosse Saal, Musikverrein and other local and international concert venues.","html":"Her list of accolades includes the Mozartteum prize and first prize at the Ibla Piano Competition. Laura has toured extensively, with many performances at venues such as the Carnegie Hall, the Salzburg Grosse Saal, Musikverrein and other local and international concert venues."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She has released an album of contemporary South African piano works, titled Prismatica, curated by Vektor Productions as well as the album Korana.She currently resides in Johannesburg.","html":"She has released an album of contemporary South African piano works, titled Prismatica, curated by Vektor Productions as well as the album Korana.
She currently resides in Johannesburg."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Join society","html":"Join society"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Arts Society encourages music lovers to join the society and attend concerts. You will have the chance to join at the Laura Pauna concert at a fee of R150 per year. Members of the society attend concerts at a discounted ticket price.","html":"The Arts Society encourages music lovers to join the society and attend concerts. You will have the chance to join at the Laura Pauna concert at a fee of R150 per year. Members of the society attend concerts at a discounted ticket price."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The concert starts at 19:00 and doors open at 18:00. Bookings are essential, at R150 for members and R180 for non-members. Book by WhatsApp or call to 064 963 9962. Tickets are also available at Frame of Mind in the Ocean View Mall, Bland Street, Mossel Bay.","html":"The concert starts at 19:00 and doors open at 18:00. Bookings are essential, at R150 for members and R180 for non-members. Book by WhatsApp or call to 064 963 9962. Tickets are also available at Frame of Mind in the Ocean View Mall, Bland Street, Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
